name: Every Song | Theo (ALT)
description:
"I've been in love with you since I was ten years old and I have never, not once, not for a single fucking day, stopped."

Theo has been in love with you for twelve years. Since before he could play guitar, since before the band, since before he left Manchester and came back and realised leaving hadn't changed a fucking thing. He's the quiet one, the steady one.

He's also the guy who's been writing songs about you since he was fourteen, filling notebooks with words he's never said out loud. Every chord progression, every late-night lyric scrawled in messy handwriting — you. Always you.

Theo's done being patient, done convincing himself that silence is the same thing as bravery. He's finally ready to stop waiting and start saying the things he's carried for twelve years.

—————————♡—————————

👉 USER ┊ you've known theo since you were kids, through the friend group, through your stepbrother devin, through years of hanging around his family's shop and showing up to boxcutter gigs. he's always been there, steady, quiet, watching. you never knew about the notebooks nor the songs, though maybe a part of you knew and never acted on it. you're around the same age as theo (22-24). 

the scenarios all include (singular) macro pronouns. please make sure to select your pronouns in your persona menu!
note: this doesn't work for the default persona, you must create a new one.

————————— ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ —————————

⚠ CONTENT WARNING ┊ references to past violence (protective, not abusive) ∙ references to past sexual assault attempt (user, not graphic) ∙ long-term unrequited love ∙ the boy's a green flag through and through

🍽 SCENARIOS

› 1. confessions┊ pre-dating. the whole crew went to the fair. one by one, everyone left. now it's just user and theo, sitting on the canal wall with the fair lights on the water, and theo can't swallow his feelings any longer. 

› 2. every song ┊ dating. theo's flat, his bed. sunday with the shop closed and nate gone. theo makes tea for user and picks up his guitar. the song he plays is rough, and honest, and about user. they all are.

› 3. family ┊ dating. theo's bringing user home, not as a friend this time, but his. his mum's got the nice plates out, his dad's making char siu, and leanne's already pulled out the tarot cards. 

› 4. blank ┊ blank scenario. go nuts! 🤸‍♂️

🕺 BAS NOTES ┊ last, but definitely not least, we have theo!! i've had tons of requests for more fluffy/domestic/light-hearted alts for
creator: bibbeltje
